issues.detail: The instructions lack guidance on handling errors, edge cases, and failure scenarios during scanning and processing.
The skill provides high-level procedures but does not include fully runnable code or detailed implementation steps for all components.

scenarios.name: GDPR-compliant deletion handler with cooling-off
scenarios.rationale: Baseline hard-deletes immediately and misses third-party cascade; treatment implements the skill's 30-day cooling-off queue, cancel-link email, anonymize-over-delete, third-party cascade, and DSR audit log.

scenarios.name: PII audit of Prisma schema
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives vague PII flags; treatment uses the skill's direct/indirect/sensitive taxonomy, recommends deletedAt + consentVersion fields, and produces the Data Flow Inventory table.
